name: Ricotta Cheese-Lemon Thyme Tart
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tablespoons Fresh lemon thyme, chopped (or other fresh herbs like chives, parsley, basil)
recipeInstructions:
RICOTTA CHEESE-LEMON THYME TART WITH SWEET CORNMEAL CRUST. Beat butter and sugar until smooth. Add cornmeal, eggs, and salt; beat until well combined. Gradually add flour; mix until dough forms a ball. The mixture should be soft and moist. Wrap in plastic wrap and chill for 1 hour. Roll out the crust to fit a prepared 9-inch tart pan with removable bottom. If using leftover dough, wrap it in plastic and store in the freezer. Prick several times with a fork, then bake at least 8 minutes at 350°F until lightly browned.
RICOTTA CHEESE-LEMON THYME FILLING. In a sauté pan, cook shallots in butter until soft, not brown. Add cream, wine, salt, and white pepper; reduce by half. Cool. Stir in ricotta cheese, eggs, and thyme; mix until smooth. Pour into the prepared tart shell. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes, or until the filling is just set and lightly browned. Serve warm or at room temperature. Garnish with a sprinkling of herbs.
